nasb.text: Maacah the wife of Machir bore a son, and she named him Peresh; and the name of his brother was Sheresh, and his sons were Ulam and Rakem.

esv.text: And Maacah the wife of Machir bore a son, and she called his name Peresh; and the name of his brother was Sheresh; and his sons were Ulam and Rakem.

cnv.text: 瑪吉的妻子瑪迦生了一個兒子，她就給他起名叫毘利施；毘利施的兄弟名叫示利施；示利施的兒子是烏蘭和利金。

ccb.text: 玛吉的妻子玛迦生了一个儿子，给他取名叫毗利施。毗利施的兄弟名叫示利施，示利施的儿子是乌兰和利金。
